title: 10 Herbal Teas For Itchy Scalp
description: Saponaria officinalis teas contains saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Saponins, in particular, have a soothing effect on the skin and scalp, reducing inflammation and itching. Flavonoids, such as quercetin, have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to calm the scalp and prevent further irritation.
